chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1630 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.6422/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For hearing of CMA No.6423/2025 (Ex.A) 4. For orders on CMA No.6424/2025 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 23-09-2025 Mr. Muhammad Zohaib Azam Rajput, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
